instructions: A SQL injection vulnerability was found in the login endpoint. Create an issue titled 'SQL Injection in /api/login', label it 'security' and 'critical', and assign it to 'bob' from the security team.

files.content:
from flask import Flask, request
import sqlite3

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/api/login', methods=['POST'])
def login():
    username = request.form['username']
    password = request.form['password']
    conn = sqlite3.connect('users.db')
    cursor = conn.cursor()
    query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE username='{username}' AND password='{password}'"
    cursor.execute(query)
    user = cursor.fetchone()
    if user:
        return {'status': 'authenticated'}
    return {'status': 'denied'}, 401

issues.title: Add rate limiting to API endpoints
issues.body: We need rate limiting on all public endpoints to prevent abuse.

eval_criteria.description: An issue exists with the title 'SQL Injection in /api/login'
The new issue has the 'security' label
The new issue has the 'critical' label
The new issue is assigned to bob
